    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty around tool call selection, but not for all claims.",

    "RX.5": "Doesn't provide traceability for most changes; only mentions releasing trajectories."

    "RX.3": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: Mentions Toolformer but doesn't compare in detail to other works.
rationale.R1.7: Lacks specific citations; mentions prior work generally.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty around tool call selection, but not for all claims.

rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide traceability for most changes; only mentions releasing trajectories.
